steps.title: Find the verb's subject
steps.content: In the relative clause "which ______ located in Newark," the word "which" refers to Newark Liberty International Airport. That antecedent is singular, and the location is stated as a present fact.

steps.title: Use singular present tense
steps.content: Choice B is plural present. Choice C is plural past and does not fit a current location fact. Choice D is also plural. The singular present-tense verb agrees with the airport. The answer is A.
